reviews.author: isabelle Renault
reviews.text: Wow! Thank you for the outstanding video you created. The quality of your work, professionalism, and attention to detail are well above standard. I am very grateful. This video will go a long way in sharing our welcome message to new members. I can't wait to share it with our Board members at our upcoming board meeting. We are blessed to have you as a member of the St. Johns County Chamber of Commerce.

reviews.author: Anna Gilbert
reviews.text: Wow! The photos are absolutely incredible—I LOVE them! Thank you to Diego and Trista for capturing the energy and special moments of the Spanish Food & Wine Festival so beautifully. Your attention to detail really showed in the final product. It was also an absolute pleasure working with you! Your professionalism, creativity, and smooth approach made everything so easy, and I'm so glad to hear you had a great experience with our event team. ~Until Next Time~

reviews.author: Quatrefoil Associates
reviews.text: We enjoyed working with Diego. His team was responsive in their replies and correspondence. They took great photos and video clips that will go a long way for our exhibition design business.

reviews.author: Kelsey May
reviews.text: So happy Diego is in St. Johns County! He recorded one of our speakers for history club in the fall of 2025. At one point before the talk started I looked over and he was crouching down next to the speaker to get her mic'd. She's a senior who uses a wheelchair. From where I was standing I could see her smiling and laughing a little. I could tell he was making her feel comfortable and taking care of her so she would sound great. And she did. She looked great too. He listened to what she wanted for lighting and he was really easy to schedule with and work with. So glad he could come out for our meeting. The recording looks and sounds way better than I thought it could. Stoked this photography and videography resource is here in St. Augustine

reviews.author: John Kersey
reviews.text: Diego did an incredible job capturing our event! From start to finish, he was professional, reliable, and easy to work with. He has a great eye for detail, and the way he brought the energy of the day to life through his filming was amazing. The final product exceeded our expectations — high quality, creative, and something we'll cherish and share for a long time. I highly recommend Diego to anyone looking for top-notch videography.

reviews.author: Emma Parmar
reviews.text: It was such a pleasure working with First Sight Films. We hired them to take our holiday family photographs. From our first conversation with Trista and Diego, they were professional, great with communication and full of great ideas! They made the whole family feel so comfortable in front of the camera and the photos came out absolutely stunning! I highly recommend First Sight Films.

reviews.author: Laura Baldwin
reviews.text: Diego & Trista delivered high-quality photo, video, and audio that really helped us tell our organization's story. They were accommodating to our schedule, professional, and put our interviewees at ease. We look forward to working with them again!

reviews.author: Chris Minnis
reviews.text: It was a pleasure working with Diego. He made it comfortable and easy. The equipment was top-notch and professionally operated. I enjoyed the recording session and would recommend working with them to anyone in the market for their services.

reviews.author: Amy Angelilli
reviews.text: What a fabulous experience! Diego makes it easy, and, makes you look great too.

reviews.author: HMA Mortgage
reviews.text: Wow, the videos that Diego and the team created for our corporate Sales Rally were absolutely spectacular! They completely captured our vibe (and definitely made us look cool)! They were tuned into our goals and objectives, and delivered a product that went above and beyond!

reviews.author: Melanie Schuler
reviews.text: I worked with Diego and Trista for the HMA 2025 Sales Rally and they were amazing. The entire process from booking to the final video deliverables, everything was professionally done. They have excellent communication skills, and Diego is very detailed when it comes to making sure he meets your expectations. Our team is so impressed with you both and we truly hope to work together again in the near future!

reviews.author: Logan
reviews.text: Diego and Trista took beautiful photos of my wife and I's special day! While they took beautiful photos, they also made the photo shoot fun with all the different shots they took. We wouldn't have wanted anyone else to take our photos that day and I highly recommend them if you're looking for a photographer for weddings, events or any occasion for that matter.

reviews.author: LA Tango Academy
reviews.text: Diego exceeded all my expectations with his fantastic photography! He flawlessly captured the essence of my event and the emotions of the attendees. His fast turnaround time was a pleasant surprise, and I'm eagerly anticipating the video footage. I will absolutely be hiring Diego again for future events. Thank you for your outstanding work!

reviews.author: Manon Narbonne
reviews.text: Diego did an amazing job at capturing the perfect moments during our tango event which hosted a few hundred dancers. I highly recommend working with Diego. He's a calm, attentive person and very professional. Thank you Diego!

reviews.author: Sharath Raj
reviews.text: We had Diego over in Austin TX for a weekend dance event and the photos were lovely. The moments were captured so beautifully that it takes me back to the event when I look at them a month after the event. I recommend Diego to anyone. He also has a very calming energy that feels very grounding. Haha he is a great guy to have around.

reviews.author: Lauren Shirer
reviews.text: Diego went above and beyond to make my promo video beautiful and personalized. He made it easy to just be myself and elevated all the best parts. Highly recommend

reviews.author: Jewel Rechsteiner
reviews.text: I approached Diego for design-review and branding advice. He has an eye for consistency and insightful commentary that is above and beyond most professionals that I know. I'm also familiar with his photography & videography work, which is excellent. Highly recommend working with this human; even if you have an unusual problem, Diego can likely help you get through it.

reviews.author: Raychill Muller
reviews.text: Diego took photos of an air Bnb rental for me. His pricing was fair and transparent and the photos were perfect. I highly recommend Diego.

reviews.author: Jamison Hooks Cross
reviews.text: Whether you need photography, a promotional video, drone footage, etc... Diego can help! Creative eye, great attention to detail, and fantastic to work with!
